high_findings_resolved_inline.description: entity_engine.complete_phase / transition_phase silently dropped workspace_uuid kwarg
high_findings_resolved_inline.fix: Forwarded workspace_uuid to _frozen_engine.complete_phase / _frozen_engine.transition_phase + extended _feature_complete with workspace_uuid kwarg. _fived_* helpers remain unscoped (parent entity row supplies workspace_uuid; documented inline).

high_findings_resolved_inline.description: AC-11 test name + threshold mismatch — implementation used test_migration_11_runtime_under_2s with hard <2s gate; spec requires test_migration_11_runtime with <30s hard + >2s warn
high_findings_resolved_inline.fix: Renamed class TestMigration11Timing.test_migration_11_runtime (exact spec name). Replaced `assert elapsed < 2.0` with conditional `warnings.warn(...)` at >2s + `assert elapsed < 30.0` hard gate.

high_findings_resolved_inline.description: Missing test_migration_11_stress_benchmark (10000 rows, @pytest.mark.benchmark) required by AC-11
high_findings_resolved_inline.fix: Added TestMigration11StressBenchmark class with test_migration_11_stress_benchmark. Registered `benchmark` marker in pyproject.toml under [tool.pytest.ini_options].

high_findings_resolved_inline.description: AC-4 markdown sweep incomplete — 3 hits remained in plugins/pd/skills/{brainstorming,decomposing}/SKILL.md beyond the 14 hits in plugins/pd/commands/
high_findings_resolved_inline.fix: Rewrote both files to use parent_uuid (resolved via get_entity(ref=...)) instead of parent_type_id. grep -rn 'parent_type_id' plugins/pd/{commands,skills} --include='*.md' returns 0.

med_findings_filed_to_backlog.description: WorkflowStateEngine.transition_phase dead workspace_uuid kwarg on non-terminal paths
_filter_states_by_workspace bare-except silently bypasses workspace isolation under DB errors
